title: What is OpenClaw?
content:
# What is OpenClaw?

**OpenClaw** is your personal AI assistant that runs on your own computer. Think of it like having ChatGPT, but private, customizable, and connected to your own tools.

---

## рҹҺҜ What You'll Learn in This Guide

By the end of this guide, you will:

- вң… Understand what OpenClaw can do for you
- вң… Know if your computer is ready
- вң… Have OpenClaw installed and running
- вң… Be chatting with your first AI assistant

**Time to complete:** ~30 minutes

---

## рҹӨ” Why Use OpenClaw?

### Privacy
Your conversations stay on your computer. No data sent to third parties unless you choose to connect services.

### Customizable
Add skills and tools for YOUR specific needs:
- Connect to your calendar
- Read your files
- Search the web
- Control smart home devices
- And much more!

### Multiple AI Models
Not locked into one AI provider:
- **OpenAI GPT-4** - Most capable
- **Anthropic Claude** - Great for writing
- **Local models** - Run offline, completely private

### Automation
Connect AI to your workflow:
- "Summarize my emails and add tasks to my todo list"
- "Check my calendar and suggest meeting prep"
- "Monitor this website and alert me when it changes"

### Cost-Effective
- Use your existing API keys
- Pay only for what you use
- No monthly subscription required

---

## рҹ“Ҡ OpenClaw vs Other AI Tools

| Feature | OpenClaw | ChatGPT Web | Claude Web |
|---------|----------|-------------|------------|
| **Privacy** | вң… Full control | вқҢ Cloud-based | вқҢ Cloud-based |
| **Customization** | вң… Unlimited | вқҢ Limited | вқҢ Limited |
| **Your Data** | вң… Local access | вқҢ Manual upload | вқҢ Manual upload |
| **Automation** | вң… Yes | вқҢ No | вқҢ No |
| **Offline** | вң… With local models | вқҢ No | вқҢ No |
| **Cost** | рҹ’° Pay per use | рҹ’° Subscription | рҹ’° Subscription |

---

## рҹ’Ў Real-World Use Cases

### For Developers
```
"Review my pull request and suggest improvements"
"Generate unit tests for this function"
"Explain this error message and how to fix it"
```

### For Writers
```
"Help me outline this article"
"Rewrite this paragraph to be more engaging"
"Check this for grammar and clarity"
```

### For Business
```
"Summarize this meeting transcript"
"Draft a response to this email"
"Create a project timeline based on these requirements"
```

### For Learning
```
"Explain machine learning like I'm 12"
"Quiz me on Spanish vocabulary"
"Help me understand this research paper"
```

---

## рҹҸ—пёҸ How OpenClaw Works

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ            YOUR COMPUTER                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ        OpenClaw App               в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  AI Models  в”Ӯ  Your Skills   в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  (GPT-4,    в”Ӯ  (Calendar,    в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   Claude)   в”Ӯ   Files, Web)  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                 вҶ“ вҶ‘                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         Your Data (Local)                в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

---

## вҡ пёҸ Before You Start

**You'll need:**
1. A computer (Mac, Windows, or Linux)
2. Internet connection (for setup)
3. An OpenAI or Anthropic API key (~$5 to start)

**Don't worry if you don't have an API key yet** - I'll show you how to get one in the next lesson.

---

## вң… Knowledge Check

Before moving on, make sure you can answer:

1. What's the main benefit of running AI locally?
2. Can OpenClaw connect to your files and calendar?
3. Do you need a subscription to use OpenClaw?

<details>
<summary>Click to see answers</summary>

1. **Privacy** - Your data stays on your computer
2. **Yes!** - OpenClaw can connect to your tools
3. **No** - You only pay for the AI you use via API keys

</details>

---

## рҹҺҜ Next Step

Ready to set up OpenClaw? Let's check your system requirements first.

**вҶ’ Proceed to Lesson 2: System Requirements**

title: System Requirements
content:
# System Requirements Before installing OpenClaw, let's make sure your computer is ready. --- ## рҹ“Ӣ Minimum Requirements | Requirement | Minimum | Recommended | Why It Matters | |-------------|---------|-------------|----------------| | **RAM** | 4 GB | 8 GB+ | AI models need memory | | **Storage** | 2 GB free | 5 GB+ free | OpenClaw + cache | | **OS** | Windows 10, macOS 10.15, Ubuntu 20.04 | Latest versions | Compatibility | | **Internet** | Required for setup | Broadband | Download + API calls | --- ## рҹ”Қ Step 1: Check Your Computer ### Windows 1. Press `Windows Key + R` 2. Type `dxdiag` and press Enter 3. Look at: - **Memory:** Should show 4GB+ - **OS:** Should be Windows 10 or 11 ### macOS 1. Click Apple Menu вҶ’ About This Mac 2. Check: - **Memory:** Should show 4GB+ - **macOS Version:** Should be 10.15 (Catalina) or newer ### Linux (Ubuntu) Open Terminal and run: ```bash free -h # Check RAM (look for "Mem:" line) lsb_release -a # Check Ubuntu version ``` --- ## рҹ”‘ Step 2: Get Your API Key OpenClaw needs an API key to talk to AI models. Here's how to get one: ### Option A: OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-3.5) - Recommended 1. Go to **[platform.openai.com](https://platform.openai.com)** 2. Click **Sign Up** (or log in if you have an account) 3. Go to **API Keys** вҶ’ **Create new secret key** 4. **Copy and save it securely** (you won't see it again!) 5. Add a payment method (minimum $5) **Cost estimate:** - GPT-4: ~$0.03 per conversation - GPT-3.5: ~$0.002 per conversation > рҹ’Ў **Tip:** Start with $5 credit. That's enough for ~150 GPT-4 conversations or ~2,500 GPT-3.5 conversations. ### Option B: Anthropic (Claude) - Alternative 1. Go to **[console.anthropic.com](https://console.anthropic.com)** 2. Create an account 3. Generate an API key 4. Add credits **Cost estimate:** - Claude 3.5 Sonnet: ~$0.03 per conversation --- ## рҹӣ пёҸ Step 3: Install Node.js OpenClaw runs on Node.js. Here's how to check if you have it: ### Check if Node.js is installed Open your terminal/command prompt and type: ```bash node --version ``` **If you see a version number** (like `v18.17.0` or `v20.10.0`), you're good! Skip to the next section. **If you see "command not found"**, install Node.js: ### Install Node.js | OS | Instructions | |-----|-------------| | **Windows** | 1. Go to [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org)
2. Download the **LTS** version
3. Run the installer (click Next, Next, Next) | | **macOS** | **Option 1:** Download from [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org) (easier)
**Option 2:** `brew install node` (if you use Homebrew) | | **Linux** | ```bash curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash - sudo apt-get install -y nodejs ``` | ### Verify Installation Close and reopen your terminal, then run: ```bash node --version npm --version ``` You should see version numbers for both. --- ## вң… Pre-Installation Checklist Before proceeding, confirm: - [ ] My computer has 4GB+ RAM - [ ] I have 2GB+ free storage - [ ] I have Node.js installed (`node --version` works) - [ ] I have an API key saved securely - [ ] I have internet connection --- ## рҹҗӣ Troubleshooting ### "node is not recognized" (Windows) **Solution:** Restart your computer after installing Node.js, or add Node.js to your PATH manually. ### "npm command not found" (macOS/Linux) **Solution:** ```bash sudo chown -R $(whoami) $(npm config get prefix)/{lib/node_modules,bin,share} ``` ### "Permission denied" errors **Solution:** On Mac/Linux, use `sudo` for global installs: ```bash sudo npm install -g openclaw ``` ### Can't create OpenAI account? **Solution:** OpenAI may not be available in your country. Try Anthropic or a local AI provider. --- ## рҹҺҜ Next Step Your computer is ready! Let's install OpenClaw. **вҶ’ Proceed to Lesson 3: Installation Step-by-Step**

title: Installation Step-by-Step
content:
# Installing OpenClaw

Follow the steps for your operating system.

---

## рҹ–ҘпёҸ macOS Installation

### Step 1: Open Terminal

- Press `Cmd + Space`
- Type "Terminal"
- Press Enter

### Step 2: Install OpenClaw

```bash
npm install -g openclaw
```

**What this does:** Downloads and installs OpenClaw globally on your Mac.

### Step 3: Verify Installation

```bash
openclaw --version
```

You should see: `OpenClaw v1.x.x`

---

## рҹӘҹ Windows Installation

### Step 1: Open Command Prompt as Administrator

1. Press `Windows Key`
2. Type "cmd"
3. Right-click "Command Prompt"
4. Select "Run as administrator"

### Step 2: Install OpenClaw

```cmd
npm install -g openclaw
```

### Step 3: Verify Installation

```cmd
openclaw --version
```

---

## рҹҗ§ Linux (Ubuntu/Debian) Installation

### Step 1: Open Terminal

- Press `Ctrl + Alt + T`

### Step 2: Install OpenClaw

```bash
sudo npm install -g openclaw
```

### Step 3: Verify Installation

```bash
openclaw --version
```

---

## рҹ“Ғ Step 4: Create Your Workspace

OpenClaw needs a folder to store your configuration and conversations.

```bash
# Create a folder for your AI assistant
mkdir ~/my-ai-assistant

# Go into that folder
cd ~/my-ai-assistant

# Initialize OpenClaw
openclaw init
```

**What this creates:**
```
my-ai-assistant/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ .env              # Your API keys (keep secret!)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ config.yaml        # OpenClaw settings
в”ңв”Җв”Җ conversations/     # Your chat history
в””в”Җв”Җ skills/            # Custom skills you add
```

---

## рҹ”җ Step 5: Add Your API Key

### Create the .env file

Create a file called `.env` in your workspace folder:

**macOS/Linux:**
```bash
nano .env
```

**Windows:**
```cmd
notepad .env
```

### Add your API key

Paste this line (replace with YOUR actual key):

```
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proj-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
```

Or if using Claude:

```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
```

### Save and exit

- **macOS/Linux:** Press `Ctrl + X`, then `Y`, then `Enter`
- **Windows:** Press `Ctrl + S`, then close Notepad

> вҡ пёҸ **IMPORTANT:** Never share your `.env` file or commit it to GitHub! It contains your secret API keys.

---

## вң… Installation Checklist

- [ ] OpenClaw installed (`openclaw --version` works)
- [ ] Workspace created (`openclaw init` succeeded)
- [ ] .env file created with API key
- [ ] API key is correct (no extra spaces)

---

## рҹ§Ә Quick Test

Try running OpenClaw to make sure everything works:

```bash
openclaw start
```

You should see:
```
рҹӨ– OpenClaw is ready!

You: _
```

Type `exit` to quit for now.

---

## рҹҗӣ Troubleshooting

### "npm ERR! permission denied"

**macOS/Linux:** Use sudo
```bash
sudo npm install -g openclaw
```

**Windows:** Run Command Prompt as Administrator

### "command not found: openclaw"

**Solution:** 
1. Restart your terminal
2. Verify npm global path: `npm config get prefix`
3. Make sure that path is in your PATH

### "EACCES permission denied"

**Solution:** Fix npm permissions
```bash
mkdir ~/.npm-global
npm config set prefix '~/.npm-global'
echo 'export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc
source ~/.bashrc
```

### "openclaw init fails"

**Solution:** Make sure you're in an empty folder
```bash
mkdir fresh-start
cd fresh-start
openclaw init
```

---

## рҹҺҜ Next Step

OpenClaw is installed! Now let's start chatting with your AI assistant.

**вҶ’ Proceed to Lesson 4: Your First AI Assistant**

title: Your First AI Assistant
content:
# Your First AI Assistant

Time to start chatting with your personal AI assistant!

---

## рҹҡҖ Step 1: Start OpenClaw

In your workspace folder:

```bash
cd ~/my-ai-assistant
openclaw start
```

You'll see:

```
рҹӨ– OpenClaw is ready!
Model: gpt-4

You: _
```

**Congratulations!** рҹҺү Your AI assistant is running!

---

## рҹ’¬ Step 2: Your First Conversation

Type your first message:

```
You: Hello! Can you help me write a professional email?
```

The AI will respond:

```
Assistant: Of course! I'd be happy to help you write a professional email.
What's the purpose of the email and who is the recipient?
```

Continue the conversation:

```
You: I need to request a meeting with my boss about a project deadline.

Assistant: Here's a draft:

Subject: Request for Meeting - Project Deadline Discussion

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I would like to request...

[Full email continues...]
```

---

## рҹҺҜ Step 3: Try These Example Prompts

### For Writing
```
"Write a LinkedIn post about AI trends in 2024"
"Help me rewrite this paragraph to be more professional"
"Create an outline for a blog post about remote work"
```

### For Learning
```
"Explain machine learning like I'm 12 years old"
"What's the difference between SQL and NoSQL databases?"
"Teach me the basics of React hooks"
```

### For Coding
```
"Write a Python function to sort a list of numbers"
"Debug this code: [paste your code]"
"Explain what this regex does: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$"
```

### For Analysis
```
"Summarize the key points of this article: [paste text]"
"Compare the pros and cons of React vs Vue"
"What are 5 creative uses for GPT-4?"
```

---

## рҹӣ пёҸ Step 4: Add Skills (Make It Smarter)

Skills let OpenClaw do more than just chat. Here are some useful ones:

### Web Search
```bash
openclaw skill add web-search
```

**Now you can ask:**
```
"Search for the latest news about AI and summarize it"
"What's the current stock price of Apple?"
```

### File Operations
```bash
openclaw skill add filesystem
```

**Now you can say:**
```
"Read my notes.txt file and summarize it"
"Create a new file called ideas.md with these bullet points"
```

### Calendar Integration
```bash
openclaw skill add calendar
```

**Now you can ask:**
```
"What's on my schedule today?"
"Add a meeting tomorrow at 2pm about project review"
```

### Weather
```bash
openclaw skill add weather
```

**Now you can ask:**
```
"What's the weather in Singapore?"
```

---

## вҢЁпёҸ Useful Commands

| Command | What It Does |
|---------|-------------|
| `clear` | Clear the screen |
| `exit` | Quit OpenClaw |
| `help` | Show all commands |
| `вҶ‘` (up arrow) | Show previous message |
| `Ctrl + C` | Cancel current input |
| `Ctrl + D` | Exit OpenClaw |

---

## рҹҺЁ Customize Your Assistant

### Change the AI Model

Edit `config.yaml`:

```yaml
model: gpt-4           # Most capable, more expensive
# model: gpt-3.5-turbo  # Faster, cheaper
# model: claude-3-opus  # Anthropic's best
```

### Change the System Prompt

Give your assistant a personality:

```yaml
system_prompt: |
  You are a helpful coding assistant who explains things clearly.
  Always provide code examples when answering questions.
  Keep responses concise but thorough.
```

---

## рҹ“Ҡ Understanding Costs

### How Pricing Works

- You pay per **token** (roughly 1 token = 4 characters)
- **Input tokens** = What you send
- **Output tokens** = What the AI responds

### Cost Examples

| Model | Input (per 1K tokens) | Output (per 1K tokens) | Typical Chat |
|-------|----------------------|------------------------|-------------|
| GPT-4 | $0.03 | $0.06 | ~$0.05 |
| GPT-3.5 | $0.0005 | $0.0015 | ~$0.002 |
| Claude 3.5 Sonnet | $0.003 | $0.015 | ~$0.02 |

### Monitor Your Usage

```bash
openclaw usage
```

This shows:
- Tokens used today
- Estimated cost
- Remaining budget

---

## вң… Practice Exercises

### Exercise 1: Basic Conversation
Have a 5-message conversation about a topic you're interested in.

<details>
<summary>Try this prompt</summary>

```
"I want to learn about [topic]. Can you explain it to me in simple terms, 
then give me 3 practical exercises to practice?"
```

</details>

### Exercise 2: Writing Task
Ask the AI to help you write something for your work or personal life.

<details>
<summary>Try this prompt</summary>

```
"Write a professional email to [describe situation]. 
Make it concise but friendly."
```

</details>

### Exercise 3: Add a Skill
Install one skill and use it.

<details>
<summary>Try this</summary>

```bash
# Install weather skill
openclaw skill add weather

# Then ask:
"What's the weather like in Tokyo right now?"
```

</details>

---

## рҹҗӣ Troubleshooting

### "API key invalid"

**Solution:** Check your `.env` file:
1. Make sure there are no extra spaces
2. Make sure the key starts with `sk-`
3. Make sure there are no line breaks in the key

### "Rate limit exceeded"

**Solution:** You're sending requests too fast. Wait a minute and try again.

### "Model not found"

**Solution:** Check your model name in `config.yaml`. Valid options:
- `gpt-4`
- `gpt-3.5-turbo`
- `claude-3-opus-20240229`
- `claude-3-sonnet-20240229`

### Responses are cut off

**Solution:** Increase max tokens in `config.yaml`:
```yaml
max_tokens: 4096
```

---

## рҹҺ“ What You've Learned

вң… How to start OpenClaw
вң… How to have a conversation with AI
вң… How to add skills
вң… How to customize settings
вң… How to understand costs

---

## рҹҡҖ Next Steps

### Explore More Skills
Visit **[clawhub.com](https://clawhub.com)** to discover community-created skills:
- Email automation
- Document analysis
- Code review
- And much more!

### Read the Docs
Full documentation at **[docs.openclaw.ai](https://docs.openclaw.ai)**

### Join the Community
Connect with other users at **[discord.gg/clawd](https://discord.gg/clawd)**

---

## рҹҺү Congratulations!

You now have your own personal AI assistant running locally on your computer.

**You can:**
- Chat with AI anytime
- Keep your data private
- Customize it for your needs
- Add powerful skills

**Your journey starts now!** рҹҡҖ
